zh: 正是他帮助了我。
en: It was he who helped me.

zh: 正是昨天她买了那本书。
en: It was yesterday that she bought the book.

zh: 正是在图书馆我找到了那本书。
en: It was in the library that I found the book.

zh: 正是努力让他成功了。
en: It was hard work that made him successful.

zh: 正是她的微笑让我感到快乐。
en: It is her smile that makes me happy.

zh: 正是这个问题让我们困惑。
en: It is this problem that confuses us.

zh: 正是在那一刻他意识到了真相。
en: It was at that moment that he realized the truth.

zh: 正是因为她的帮助，我才成功了。
en: It was because of her help that I succeeded.

zh: 正是这本书改变了他的人生。
en: It was this book that changed his life.

zh: 正是他们的团队合作赢得了比赛。
en: It was their teamwork that won the game.

zh: 我真正需要的是你的支持。
en: What I really need is your support.

zh: 让我惊讶的是她的勇气。
en: What surprised me was her courage.

zh: 他所说的让我们深受感动。
en: What he said moved us deeply.

zh: 我最喜欢的是她的诚实。
en: What I like most about her is her honesty.

zh: 让我担心的是他的健康。
en: What worries me is his health.

zh: 昨天是谁打电话给你？
en: Who was it that called you yesterday?

zh: 是什么让你改变了主意？
en: What was it that made you change your mind?

zh: 你是在哪里找到那本书的？
en: Where was it that you found the book?

zh: 他是什么时候离开的？
en: When was it that he left?

zh: 是什么原因让她哭泣？
en: What was it that made her cry?

zh: 正是这次经历让他成长了。
en: It was this experience that helped him grow.

zh: 正是她的努力让她脱颖而出。
en: It is her effort that makes her stand out.

zh: 正是在那个夏天他们相遇了。
en: It was in that summer that they met.

zh: 正是这个决定改变了他的命运。
en: It was this decision that changed his fate.

zh: 正是音乐给了她力量。
en: It is music that gives her strength.

zh: 他真正想要的是和平与安宁。
en: What he truly wants is peace and quiet.

zh: 让她成功的是她的坚持不懈。
en: What made her successful was her perseverance.

zh: 我们需要的是更多的时间和资源。
en: What we need is more time and resources.

zh: 让这个城市出名的是它的美食。
en: What makes this city famous is its food.

zh: 他留给我们的是宝贵的精神财富。
en: What he left us is a precious spiritual legacy.
